grant_title: New Jersey Tech Companies Donate Scholarship Funding and Grants to Support STEM Initiatives
geographic_restrictions: Primarily New Jersey and 22 states across the U.S. (for Cognizant grants)
project_area: STEM education, scholarship funding, and after-school/summer programs
demographic_requirements: Students excelling in math, sciences, engineering, healthcare, or related STEM fields
eligibility_summary: Open to non-profit organizations running STEM education programs and students (college and high school) demonstrating academic excellence in STEM fields.
